# Digizelle

> Digizelle is a French non-profit (loi 1901, founded 2023) dedicated to digital
> inclusion of young people — especially young women — in the Paris region and
> beyond. Workshops, masterclasses, hackathons, the Mentora 1-to-1 mentorship
> program and an online community help young people move from "I'd love to" to
> "I'm doing it" in the tech world.

The site is bilingual (French primary, English partial). All structured data
is exposed via JSON-LD on each page (Organization, Article, Event, FAQPage,
Person, Service, BreadcrumbList).

## About the organization
- [About Digizelle](https://digizelle.fr/about): mission, values, milestones, founder.
- [The team](https://digizelle.fr/team): 8 active members with roles, bios and links.
- [Contact](https://digizelle.fr/contact): contact form for the public, DPO email for RGPD requests.
- [Manifesto](https://digizelle.fr/about#manifesto): three pillars — inclusion, mentorship, community.

## Programs and offerings
- [Programs overview](https://digizelle.fr/programs): four formats — Atelier Immersif (3 days), Masterclass (intensive), Hackathon (48h), Mentora (long-term mentorship).
- [Mentora](https://digizelle.fr/mentora): 1-to-1 mentorship pairing youth with volunteer mentors for 6 months. Algorithmic matching, video sessions, shared calendar, messaging.
- [Events](https://digizelle.fr/events): upcoming and past events, partner co-organisations (Microsoft, EY, HEC, Epitech, Allianz Technology, AWS, Station F, BECOMTECH).

## Editorial content
- [Blog](https://digizelle.fr/blog): editorial posts on tech inclusion, hackathon recaps, AI tooling, stack choices. JSON-LD `BlogPosting` per article with `datePublished`.
- [FAQ](https://digizelle.fr/faq): 30+ Q&A grouped by category (general, signup, programs, Mentora, community, privacy). Indexed as `FAQPage` JSON-LD.

## Legal
- [Mentions légales](https://digizelle.fr/legal): legal notice, publisher info.
- [Confidentialité](https://digizelle.fr/privacy): RGPD privacy policy, lawful bases, data subject rights.
- [Cookies](https://digizelle.fr/cookies): cookie inventory, third-party usage, consent management.

## Sitemap
- [XML sitemap](https://digizelle.fr/sitemap.xml): full URL index for crawlers.
- [Robots](https://digizelle.fr/robots.txt): explicit allow-list for AI crawlers (GPTBot, ClaudeBot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, CCBot, Applebot-Extended).

## Optional
- [Connected app — Mentora dashboard](https://digizelle.fr/mentora/dashboard): authenticated mentee/mentor dashboard. Auth-gated; no public content for crawlers.
- [Connected app — Community feed](https://digizelle.fr/community): authenticated community feed. Auth-gated; no public content for crawlers.
